title: Tier 1 Warden
description: Changes Warden AI to use TNT minecarts, pots, pearls, totems, and Wind Charge/Mace attacks.
body:
Modifies the Warden AI to use various PvP tactics and items, such as but not limited to:
- using splash potions to increase their strength
- placing a tnt minecart and shooting it with a flaming arrow
- ender pearling to far away players
- using a "wind charge" to propel itself off the ground..
- .. and performing a (fake) mace smash attack

Wardens will additionally no longer use their sonic boom attack or apply darkness. 

Warden spawning remains the same, and it will unfortunately not drop any new items. This mod was made purely as a joke, but even jokes have value, right?

Warning: Needless to say, but this will result in Wardens being very proficient at griefing, even with mobgriefing off!
